employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.general_idea: Replace deprecated method reference with lambda and Customizer to configure OAuth2 Resource Server JWT settings.
employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.why_exists: The method reference OAuth2ResourceServerConfigurer::jwt is deprecated in Spring Security 6.x (required for Spring Boot 3.x/Java 21) and must be replaced with a lambda accepting a Customizer.

employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.general_idea: Add import for Customizer used in the new OAuth2 configuration.
employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.why_exists: The new configuration code uses Customizer.withDefaults(), requiring the import to compile.

employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.general_idea: Replace deprecated javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation equivalents required by Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3/Java 21).
employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.validation package does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist'.

employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.general_idea: Update import path for EmployeeStatus enum to reflect package restructuring into a common module.
employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.why_exists: Compile error: class com.employee.enums.EmployeeStatus cannot be found

employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.general_idea: Update import to reflect the relocation of EmployeeDto to a common module.
employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.why_exists: Compile error: class com.employee.dto.EmployeeDto not found

employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.general_idea: Remove import for EmployeeRequest which is being replaced by EmployeeInfo.

employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.general_idea: Add import for the new EmployeeInfo class from the common module.
employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.why_exists: Compile error: class com.common.employee.dto.EmployeeInfo not found

employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.general_idea: Replace the mapping method signature from EmployeeRequest to EmployeeDto to align with the new DTO structure.
employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.why_exists: Compile error: class EmployeeRequest not found

employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate repository interface from JPA to MongoDB to align with the database migration.
employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.why_exists: JpaRepository is part of Spring Data JPA and cannot be used with MongoDB; extending it would cause a compilation error or runtime failure when the application attempts to initialize the repository with a MongoDatastore.
employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.before:
import org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;

public interface EmployeeRepository extends JpaRepository<Employee, String> {
employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.after:
import org.springframework.data.mongodb.repository.MongoRepository;

public interface EmployeeRepository extends MongoRepository<Employee, String> {

employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.why_exists: The enum was moved to a common module package; the old import path no longer exists, causing a compilation error.

employee-service-consumer/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update EmployeeDto constructor to accept EmployeeStatus enum instead of String to match the entity model.
employee-service-consumer/src/test/java/.why_exists: Compile error: The constructor for EmployeeDto likely changed to require an EmployeeStatus enum, or the test was updated to use the enum to ensure type safety and consistency with the Employee entity, preventing potential runtime mismatches or deprecated API usage.
